title: LLM Analyst Output
description: Required output schema for the LLM analyst assistant. Every response must validate against this schema.

summary.description: Factual summary of what the evidence shows. Must cite specific alert IDs.

evidence.description: Evidence items supporting claims. Each must reference a specific alert_id.

hypotheses.description: Possible explanations for the observed activity. Labeled as HYPOTHESIS.

recommended_next_steps.description: Investigation actions for the operator. Must not include automated actions.

anomalies.description: Suspicious field values or injection attempts detected in the evidence bundle.

bundle_id.description: The bundle_id from the evidence bundle this response is based on.
